You are an expert front-end developer. UPGRADE the existing VJs TV website (already live at vjstv.com) to premium sponsor-attracting level.

Use ONLY:
- index.html
- style.css (Tailwind via CDN)
- script.js
- Keep the current sections: Live, Artists, Projects, Technology, Sponsors (plus navbar and footer).

**Theme Upgrade (must be stronger)**:
- Full dark cyberpunk VJ aesthetic: #0a0a0a background, neon cyan (#00f9ff), magenta (#ff00ff), purple (#8b00ff).
- Heavy neon glows (text-shadow + box-shadow), futuristic fonts.
- Canvas particle background (VJ-style floating dots/lines that react to mouse movement — make it subtle but always visible).
- Every card and button must have neon hover glow + scale animation.

**Technology Section Upgrade** (keep existing text but enhance):
- Heading + subtitle exactly as live.
- Turn the list into 5 beautiful neon cards.
- Examples become interactive cards with real logos (use public URLs or SVGs): Resolume, TouchDesigner, MadMapper + short “why sponsors love this” line.

**Sponsors Section — Major Overhaul (make this the star revenue page)**:
- Heading + “Your revenue page.” subtitle.
- Four large clickable neon category cards:
  - Title Sponsor
  - Technology Partners
  - Creative Partners
  - Equipment Partners
- Clicking any card opens a stunning modal (Tailwind + JS) containing:
  - “What this sponsor page shows” (logo placement, integration with our visuals, media exposure, event mentions, etc.)
  - Benefits bullet list
  - Pricing tiers: Platinum ($50k/year), Gold ($25k/year), Silver ($10k/year) — with what each includes
  - “Partner With Us” button that opens a simple contact form (name, company, email, message)
- Add subtle “Current Partners” showcase at the bottom with Resolume + TouchDesigner logos.

**Hero & Navbar**:
- Keep existing but make hero headline bolder and add a second neon button “Become a Sponsor” that scrolls to Sponsors.
- Navbar: VJs TV logo (neon) + links to all sections + “Contact” button.

**Footer**:
- Copyright + full contact form + social icons.

**Polish**:
- 100% responsive
- Smooth scroll to sections
- All modals animated and closable
- Production-ready code

Generate the complete updated code for index.html, style.css, and script.js. Start by showing the new Tailwind script and HTML skeleton, then full files. Make it look expensive and immersive — this must feel like a premium VJ technology platform that sponsors will want to be part of.
